semantic.role: Engine utility function for extracting and filtering keywords from architectural rule text.
responsibilities: Tokenizes rule content into search tokens using an external extractSearchTokens function.
Filters out predefined rule-related stopwords to isolate meaningful keywords.
Limits the keyword list to a maximum of 16 unique tokens for efficiency.
outOfScope: Direct interaction with CLI or service orchestration.
invariants: Must not depend on CLI entrypoints or service orchestration modules.
Must be a pure function focused on text tokenization and filtering.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provides a reusable text processing utility for rule analysis, supporting search and categorization.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No direct evidence of the scanner/context split in this file.

English.role: Engine utility function for extracting and filtering keywords from architectural rule text.
responsibilities: Tokenizes rule content into search tokens using an external extractSearchTokens function.
Filters out predefined rule-related stopwords to isolate meaningful keywords.
Limits the keyword list to a maximum of 16 unique tokens for efficiency.
outOfScope: Direct interaction with CLI or service orchestration.

exports.name: scoreDependencyCandidate
exports.signature:
scoreDependencyCandidate(
  relativeFilePath: string,
  targetPath: string,
  importedSymbols: string[],
  doc: IndexedDoc,
  ruleKeywords: string[],
)

exports.name: scoreTargetPath
exports.signature:
scoreTargetPath(
  relativeFilePath: string,
  usage: string,
  targetPath: string,
  importTargets: Set<string>,
  importedSymbolMap: Map<string, string>,
  doc: IndexedDoc,
  ruleKeywords: string[],
)
